title: 大阪杯の後に・遠くなった背中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket commits the entirety of her
abilities, but ends up losing against the more
vigorous Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling pressured by Taishin's display, Ticket tells
herself that she needs to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, she sets her sights on the Takarazuka
Kinen, the race to conclude the first half of the
Twinkle Series.
